title: Secrets of Forging: Revelations
description: A Tetra Addon adding in modular polearms
body:
![Embers of Eden update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3eeebf40ab167090ca4a0fe748d6631ec0bd3604.png)

This mod adds in a new modular item: the polearm. The polearm has 6 head modules (8 including AoF compat), and modules similar to the singular module item. A modular polearm item can be crafted in the crafting table to get started using sticks and a material of choice (supports wood, cobblestone, iron, gold, and diamond). This mod also adds 3 new sword modules.

Optional dependancy is [Art of Forging](https://modrinth.com/mod/art-of-forging-tetra/version/1.7.0-1.19.2)


Secrets of Forging: Revelations also has support for the following mods:

- Art of Forging
- Tetra: Enlarged
- Tetratic Combat
 

Spoiler information for each of the new modules:
 

**Polearm Heads:**

- Spearhead

- Trident

- Glaive

- Pike

- Lance

- Scythe

- Halberd*

- Naginata*


(Only available when Art of Forging is installed)

 

**Greatsword Modules:**

- Claymore

- Longsword

- Straight Guard

 

**Sword Modules:**

- Chillrend Blade

- Stiletto Blade

- Straight Guard

 

## FQA:
 

 Will you backport to 1.x.x?
Nope.
 

2. I can't get the greatsword modules or the greatsword item?

The greatsword is from Tetra: Enlarged. I originally made this mod in 1.18.2 where Enlarged is supported, however there is no 1.19 version yet.
 

3. I have a crash! Please help!

Do not fear! Please leave a detailed comment here explaining the issue along with logs and crash logs, and I will do my best to help! 

 

If you having any difficulties, questions, or just want to say hi please feel free to comment on this page! I will try my best to respond to all comments as soon as I am able to :)

 

I also have a Discord server! Join [here](https://discord.gg/wpxvVzKpcz) to chat, ask questions, or even suggest a feature!
